institution.zh: 中国科学院大学 水土保持与生态环境研究中心
institution.en: University of Chinese Academy of Sciences, Institute of Soil and Water Conservation

institution.zh: 山东农业大学 水利土木工程学院
institution.en: Shandong Agricultural University, College of Water Conservancy and Civil Engineering

institution.zh: 山东农业大学 水利土木工程学院
institution.en: Shandong Agricultural University, College of Water Conservancy and Civil Engineering

degree.zh: 工学学士（水文与水资源工程）
degree.en: B.Eng. in Hydrology and Water Resources

bio.zh: 主要关注植物多样性与土壤水碳耦合关系、土壤有机碳形成与转化机制和土壤侵蚀与水土保持等方向。综合采用公共数据库、荟萃（meta）分析和野外以及室内实验等方法，开展全球、区域和样地尺度的土壤生态学、森林生态系统和生态水文等方向的研究。
bio.en: My research focuses on plant diversity–soil water-carbon coupling, soil organic carbon formation and transformation mechanisms, and soil erosion and conservation. I integrate public databases, meta-analysis, field observations, and laboratory experiments to conduct multi-scale research in soil ecology, forest ecosystems, and ecohydrology.

enrollment.zh: 生态学（学硕）；林业（专硕）；风景园林（专硕）
enrollment.en: Ecology (Academic Master); Forestry (Professional Master); Landscape Architecture (Professional Master)

institution.zh: 西北农林科技大学 资源环境学院
institution.en: Northwest A&F University, College of Resources and Environment

institution.zh: 山东农业大学 水利土木工程学院
institution.en: Shandong Agricultural University, College of Water Conservancy and Civil Engineering

degree.zh: 工学硕士（水利水电工程）
degree.en: M.Eng. in Hydraulic and Hydropower Engineering

institution.zh: 山东农业大学 水利土木工程学院
institution.en: Shandong Agricultural University, College of Water Conservancy and Civil Engineering

degree.zh: 工学学士（水利水电工程）
degree.en: B.Eng. in Hydraulic and Hydropower Engineering

bio.zh: 主要研究方向为多源遥感定量监测、热融灾害时空分布特征、水土保持与气候变化、土壤侵蚀过程与机理。
bio.en: My research focuses on multi-source remote sensing quantitative monitoring, spatiotemporal distribution of thaw-induced hazards, soil and water conservation under climate change, and soil erosion processes and mechanisms.

enrollment.zh: 农业资源与环境（学硕）；资源利用与植物保护（专硕）
enrollment.en: Agricultural Resources and Environment (Academic Master); Resource Utilization and Plant Protection (Professional Master)

major.zh: 资源利用与植物保护（专硕）
major.en: Resource Utilization and Plant Protection (Professional Master)
